fetch_status: WebFetch_403_firewalled; fallback chain (substack, spicytakes, aaronsw rss, ycombinator, news.ycombinator HN item) all returned 403. Final fallback: WebSearch summary excerpts. WebSearch retrieved enough text to extract 12 atoms across 5 essays (Writes-and-Write-Nots, Founder Mode, Superlinear Returns, The Right Kind of Stubborn, How to Start Google).

survivors_composite_ge_0_7.novel_path: PG_E1_A09 (adolescent taste-for-broken cultivation) -> evodevo selection_pressure mechanism -> LLM pretraining curriculum design
PG_E1_A10 (writing offload to AI) -> free energy / entropy externalization -> thermodynamic prediction of collective cognitive entropy at population scale

saturation_pre_post_revision.comment: Both putative survivors retained composite >= 0.7 because cross_source_diversity, cross_disciplinary_bonus, mechanism_coherence, atom_quality, arxiv_grounding, belinda_pass all stayed >= 0.4. This is the Run 11 design intention: multi-parameter soft scoring escapes Run 10's strict L7 binary saturation kill.

rc_010_description: Run 10's L7 saturation_check was a binary gate: any cross-paper kills the candidate. Run 11's multi-parameter composite is a weighted sum; lowering saturation_cluster_distance from 0.95 to 0.55 only reduces composite by ~0.05 because cross_source_diversity, cross_disciplinary_bonus, and arxiv_grounding compensate. Whether this is a genuine escape or just a softer rubber stamp depends on the Belinda 3Q audit (Phase 4) and the cross-LLM novelty re-check (Phase 6).
